feedback.text: Hello, would love to see this include citizen rights to ownership of videogames, specially in case of buying digital and physical games that require connection to internet while using them and having no end of life plans for shutting servers and or companies, meaning terminating purchase after certain period. This feels quite unfair since for example printed books can be read and re-read as long as the physical item stays together, games can give you new worlds to see and make precious memories with your loved ones, only for publisher who wants more money to destroy those happy times by making a sequel and forcing customers to buy it by shutting down previous game. Thank you for reading this.
